requirement_topic.en: Horizontal Battery Regulation (EPR / battery passport / recycled content)
requirement_topic.zh: 横向电池法规（EPR/电池护照/再生材料含量）
requirement_topic.zht: 橫向電池法規（EPR/電池護照/再生材料含量）

summary.en: Zambia does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal battery regulation. There is no Zambian equivalent of EU Regulation 2023/1542, so there is no battery passport, carbon footprint declaration, recycled-content threshold, or per-market EPR registration specifically for batteries as a precondition of import. Instead, lithium batteries and power banks are governed through general product-conformity and import-inspection controls administered by the Zambia Bureau of Standards (ZABS) under the Standards Act and the compulsory standards / import inspection scheme, plus general environmental and waste rules under the Zambia Environmental Management Agency (ZEMA). Exporters should confirm with ZABS whether the specific battery or power bank falls under a compulsory Zambian Standard (ZS) at the time of shipment.
summary.zh: 赞比亚不设欧盟式的横向电池法规。赞比亚没有相当于EU法规2023/1542的法律，因此不存在以电池护照、碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛或按市场进行的电池EPR注册作为进口前置条件的要求。锂电池及移动电源通过赞比亚标准局（ZABS）依据《标准法》及强制标准／进口检验方案实施的一般产品合格评定与进口检验进行管理，并受赞比亚环境管理局（ZEMA）一般环境与废弃物规则约束。出口商应在发货时向ZABS确认具体电池或移动电源是否被纳入强制性赞比亚标准（ZS）。
summary.zht: 尚比亞不設歐盟式的橫向電池法規。尚比亞沒有相當於EU法規2023/1542的法律，因此不存在以電池護照、碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻或按市場進行的電池EPR登記作為進口前置條件的要求。鋰電池及行動電源透過尚比亞標準局（ZABS）依據《標準法》及強制標準／進口檢驗方案實施的一般產品合格評定與進口檢驗進行管理，並受尚比亞環境管理局（ZEMA）一般環境與廢棄物規則約束。出口商應在發貨時向ZABS確認具體電池或行動電源是否被納入強制性尚比亞標準（ZS）。

standards_or_laws: Standards Act (Zambia) — administered by Zambia Bureau of Standards (ZABS)
ZABS compulsory standards / import conformity and inspection scheme
Environmental Management Act, 2011 — Zambia Environmental Management Agency (ZEMA) general waste/environmental controls

summary.en: China governs portable lithium batteries mainly through product-safety standards (GB 31241) and, where applicable, CCC certification for finished electronic products, rather than a single horizontal battery-lifecycle regulation. China has its own recycling and extended-producer-responsibility policies for power batteries domestically, but these are not export passports and are not recognised by Zambian authorities. A Chinese GB/GB-T baseline and CCC documentation describe the product but do not by themselves clear Zambian import-conformity controls.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过产品安全标准（GB 31241）以及在适用时对成品电子产品的CCC认证来管理便携式锂电池，而非以单一横向电池全生命周期法规管理。中国在国内对动力电池设有回收及生产者责任延伸政策，但这些并非出口护照，赞比亚主管机关亦不予认可。中国GB/GB-T基线及CCC文件可描述产品，但其本身不能满足赞比亚进口合格评定控制。
summary.zht: 中國主要透過產品安全標準（GB 31241）以及在適用時對成品電子產品的CCC認證來管理便攜式鋰電池，而非以單一橫向電池全生命週期法規管理。中國在國內對動力電池設有回收及生產者責任延伸政策，但這些並非出口護照，尚比亞主管機關亦不予認可。中國GB/GB-T基線及CCC文件可描述產品，但其本身不能滿足尚比亞進口合格評定控制。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — where the finished electronic product is in CCC scope

gap.en: The key point is the ABSENCE of an EU-style horizontal battery regime in Zambia, not a stricter one. Exporters do not face a battery passport, recycled-content, or per-market EPR registration; instead they must satisfy ZABS product-conformity and import-inspection controls plus general ZEMA waste rules. Practical gaps: (1) confirm with ZABS whether the specific battery/power bank is under a compulsory ZS at time of shipment; (2) prepare conformity evidence (test reports to ZS/IEC 62133) for ZABS rather than a lifecycle passport; (3) Chinese domestic recycling/EPR documentation is not transferable. Importers should verify the current ZABS regulated-product list because scope can change.
gap.zh: 关键在于赞比亚缺少欧盟式横向电池法规，而非更严格的法规。出口商无需面对电池护照、再生材料含量或按市场的EPR注册；而须满足ZABS产品合格评定与进口检验控制以及一般ZEMA废弃物规则。实务差距：（1）发货时向ZABS确认具体电池／移动电源是否属于强制性ZS；（2）为ZABS准备合格证据（依ZS/IEC 62133出具的测试报告），而非全生命周期护照；（3）中国国内回收／EPR文件不可转用。进口商应核实当前ZABS受管制产品清单，因范围可能变动。
gap.zht: 關鍵在於尚比亞缺少歐盟式橫向電池法規，而非更嚴格的法規。出口商無需面對電池護照、再生材料含量或按市場的EPR登記；而須滿足ZABS產品合格評定與進口檢驗控制以及一般ZEMA廢棄物規則。實務差距：（1）發貨時向ZABS確認具體電池／行動電源是否屬於強制性ZS；（2）為ZABS準備合格證據（依ZS/IEC 62133出具的測試報告），而非全生命週期護照；（3）中國國內回收／EPR文件不可轉用。進口商應核實當前ZABS受管制產品清單，因範圍可能變動。

mandatory_status.target: No EU-style horizontal battery regulation in Zambia; lithium batteries are controlled via ZABS product-conformity and import-inspection scheme (mandatory where the product is a regulated/compulsory-standard item) and general ZEMA environmental rules
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 product safety, plus CCC where the finished electronic product is in scope; domestic recycling/EPR policies are non-exportable

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zambia has no EU-style horizontal battery regulation, so there is no battery passport, recycled-content, or per-market battery EPR precondition. Market access instead depends on ZABS product-conformity and import inspection plus general ZEMA waste rules. Chinese GB 31241 or CCC documentation describes the product but does not by itself clear ZABS import controls; exporters should confirm the current compulsory-standard scope with ZABS and prepare ZS/IEC-based conformity evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 赞比亚不设欧盟式横向电池法规，因此没有电池护照、再生材料含量或按市场的电池EPR前置条件。市场准入取决于ZABS产品合格评定与进口检验以及一般ZEMA废弃物规则。中国GB 31241或CCC文件可描述产品，但本身不能通过ZABS进口控制；出口商应向ZABS确认当前强制标准范围，并准备基于ZS/IEC的合格证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尚比亞不設歐盟式橫向電池法規，因此沒有電池護照、再生材料含量或按市場的電池EPR前置條件。市場准入取決於ZABS產品合格評定與進口檢驗以及一般ZEMA廢棄物規則。中國GB 31241或CCC文件可描述產品，但本身不能通過ZABS進口控制；出口商應向ZABS確認當前強制標準範圍，並準備基於ZS/IEC的合格證據。
